display.name: OpenTelemetry Collector
display.description: Pipeline health for the OTel Collector: receiver throughput, processor drops, exporter delivery, queue depth, and process resources.

display.name: service_name
display.description: Filter by collector service (service.name).

display.name: Memory Allocation Rate
display.description: Heap allocation throughput in bytes per second, per collector instance. High rates drive GC pressure and CPU overhead.

display.name: Batch Send Size (p50 / p95 / p99)
display.description: Items per batch at p50, p95, and p99. A large gap between p50 and p99 points to bursty traffic.

display.name: Batch Timeout Trigger Sends /s by Processor
display.description: Batches flushed by timeout per second, by processor. High rate with small batch sizes means the collector is under-loaded relative to the configured batch size.

display.name: CPU Usage (user + system)
display.description: CPU seconds consumed per second, per collector instance. Values near the number of available cores mean the collector is CPU-saturated.

display.name: Exporter In-Flight Requests by Exporter
display.description: Export requests currently active, including retries. High values with a slow-draining queue point to backend latency or connectivity issues.

display.name: Log Records Sent /s by Exporter
display.description: Log records delivered to the backend per second, by exporter.

display.name: Log Record Send Failures /s by Exporter
display.description: Log records the exporter failed to deliver per second.

display.name: Metric Points Sent /s by Exporter
display.description: Metric points delivered to the backend per second, by exporter.

display.name: Metric Point Send Failures /s by Exporter
display.description: Metric points the exporter failed to deliver per second.

display.name: Exporter Queue Size vs Capacity
display.description: Queue depth vs. capacity per exporter. Size approaching capacity means the exporter can't keep up with incoming data.

display.name: Exporter Queue Utilization %
display.description: Queue fill as a percentage per exporter. Above 80%, the exporter risks dropping data under sustained load.

display.name: Spans Sent /s by Exporter
display.description: Spans delivered to the backend per second, by exporter.

display.name: Span Send Failures /s by Exporter
display.description: Spans the exporter failed to deliver per second. Any non-zero value needs investigation.

display.name: Heap Memory Allocated
display.description: Heap bytes held by live objects, per collector instance. Sustained growth between GC cycles points to a memory leak.

display.name: Items Incoming /s by Processor
display.description: Items entering each processor per second. Covers spans, metric points, and log records combined.

display.name: Items Outgoing /s by Processor
display.description: Items leaving each processor per second. A rate below incoming means the processor dropped or filtered data.

display.name: Accepted Log Records /s by Receiver
display.description: Log records entering the pipeline per second, by receiver.

display.name: Refused & Failed Log Records /s by Receiver
display.description: Refused = pipeline back-pressure. Failed = internal receiver error. Both cause log record loss.

display.name: Accepted Metric Points /s by Receiver
display.description: Metric points entering the pipeline per second, by receiver.

display.name: Refused & Failed Metric Points /s by Receiver
display.description: Refused = pipeline back-pressure. Failed = internal receiver error. Both cause metric point loss.

display.name: Accepted Spans /s by Receiver
display.description: Spans entering the pipeline per second, by receiver.

display.name: Refused & Failed Spans /s by Receiver
display.description: Refused = pipeline back-pressure (downstream can't accept). Failed = internal receiver error. Both cause span loss.

display.name: Process RSS Memory
display.description: Physical memory used by each collector instance, including Go runtime overhead.

display.name: Log Records Sent /s
display.description: Log records delivered to the backend per second, summed across all exporters.

display.name: Metric Points Sent /s
display.description: Metric points delivered to the backend per second, summed across all exporters.

display.name: Spans Sent /s
display.description: Spans delivered to the backend per second, summed across all exporters.

display.name: Log Records Received /s
display.description: Log records pushed into the pipeline per second, summed across all receivers.

display.name: Metric Points Received /s
display.description: Metric points pushed into the pipeline per second, summed across all receivers.

display.name: Spans Received /s
display.description: Spans pushed into the pipeline per second, summed across all receivers.
